title: Yellow (disambiguation)
content:
'''Yellow''' can refer to the following:
[[File:AnakinsDelta7B-TCW.png|thumb|right|250px|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker's]] yellow [[Anakin Skywalker's Delta-7B Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Jedi 7-b starfighter]]]]
